title: Champion's Ashes
description: A souls and elden ring-based weapons mod
body:
This is a souls-like minecraft datapack. it added many new weapons and items from ds3 (mainly pvp) and some weapons from elden ring. The datapack also includes a new boss Nep.elder with many skills, the details and crafting recipes could be found in README file, for the weapons they are quite meta in vanilla minecraft so you can add some other mods to balance it.
The datapack added two new structure [​firelink shrine] and [​genshin switch], in which the first structure could summon the new boss.

To start, killing a wither is needed. Then you can craft new items with the recipes in energy crafter, a new crafting table, where the recipes are given in the README file. 

Compatible with epic fight mod. Weapons will have more attacks in the future.

Most weapons are compatible with multiplayers, some may incompatible for now.
